description_long: This house features a modern, boxy architectural design with a mix of materials including corrugated metal, wood paneling, and large glass windows. The structure is composed of two main volumes: a single-story section with a dark sloped roof and a taller, two-story section with a flat roof. The property is surrounded by a well-maintained yard with several mature trees and shrubs, providing privacy and greenery. The front entryway is defined by a small porch and steps, partially shaded by the roof overhang. Windows are arranged asymmetrically, with some large panes and others smaller, contributing to the contemporary aesthetic. The house sits on a rectangular lot with a paved walkway and driveway area.
description: A modern, boxy house with mixed metal and wood exteriors, asymmetrical windows, and a landscaped yard with mature trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, sloped roof, and dense landscaping with trees and shrubs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long, rectangular layout, flat-roofed section, and multiple windows along the facade.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the two-story section, fenced backyard, and a mix of wood and metal siding.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the broad sloped roof, grassy yard, and additional trees along the property edge.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with small porch, steps, and roof overhang, partially obscured by landscaping.
